title: Session Next-Trial Response
description: 200 response of POST /api/v1/sessions/{session_id}/next-trial. Mirrors the backend handler (traigent_session_routes.get_next_trial -> _normalize_session_payload, which only canonicalizes session_status). A read response: additionalProperties:true so server-added fields validate. When the trial queue is exhausted, has_next is false and trial is null.

has_next.description: Whether a next trial suggestion is available. false once the pre-generated trial queue is exhausted.

trial.description: The next trial suggestion, or null when has_next is false.

agent_specification.description: The agent configuration to evaluate for this trial.

dataset_subset_indices.description: Which dataset examples this trial is evaluated against.

remaining_trials.description: Number of trials remaining in the session queue after this suggestion.
